resources.string:
Zindan is an application to help you run other applications in an isolated profile. It does so by making use of the Work Profile feature of Android.

Click "Next", and we will provide you with more information about Zindan, and guide you through the setup process.

We suggest that you read through all of the following pages carefully.

By default, Zindan will not ask for any individual permissions. However, once you proceed with the setup process, Zindan will try to set up a Work Profile and hence become the profile manager of said profile.

This will grant Zindan an extensive list of permissions inside the profile, comparable to that of a Device Admin, albeit confined to the profile. Being the profile manager is necessary for most of Zindan's functionality.

Some advanced features of Zindan may require more permissions outside the Work Profile. When needed, Zindan will ask for those permissions separately when you enable the corresponding features.

Zindan is developed and tested on AOSP-like Android derivatives. This includes AOSP (Android Open Source Project), Google Android (on Pixels), and most AOSP-based open-source custom ROMs such as LineageOS. If your phone is running one of the Android derivatives listed above, then congratulations! Zindan is probably going to work correctly on your device.

Some device vendors introduce very invasive customizations into the Android code base, resulting in conflicts, incompatibility and unexpected behavior. Some custom ROMs can also introduce compatibility-breaking changes, but generally these are rarer occurrences compared to phone vendor-introduced incompatibilities.

Zindan is merely an interface into the Work Profile feature provided by the system. If the feature provided by the system is broken or non-standard, Zindan could not magically resolve the issue on its own. If you are currently using a vendor-modified Android version that is known to break Work Profiles, you have been warned. You may proceed anyway, but there is no guarantee that Zindan would behave correctly under these circumstances.

We are now ready to set up Zindan for you. If your device is running Android 7 or lower, please first ensure that your device is not in Do Not Disturb mode, because you will need to click on a notification later to finalize the setup process.\n\nWhen you are ready, click on \"Next\" to begin the setup process.
We are trying to initialize Work Profile and set up Zindan on your device.

We regret to inform you that we were not able to set up Zindan for you.

If your device already had a Work Profile, either from a previous installation of Zindan or from another application, you will have to remove that profile in Settings -> Account before Zindan can proceed.

Otherwise, if you did not cancel the setup manually, then the reason for the failure is most commonly due to a heavily modified system, or a conflict between Zindan and other Work Profile managers. Unfortunately, there is not much that we could do about this.

Click "Next" to exit.

You should now be seeing a notification from Zindan. Please click on that notification to finish the setup process.

If you do not see the notification, make sure your device is not in Do Not Disturb mode and try pulling down the notification center.

To reset Zindan and start over, you can clear the data of Zindan in Settings.
Click here to finish setting up Zindan
Congratulations! You are one click away from finishing setting up Zindan.
Zindan will auto-freeze apps launched from \"Unfreeze & Launch\" on the next screen lock event.
Cannot launch the app. Turn off VPN manually and try again.
Cannot install APK while VPN is active. Turn off VPN manually and try again.
Allow Zindan VPN access once so Anti Spy can clear third-party VPN before launch.
A VPN was turned on. Close the running app in the work profile, then tap Yes to batch-freeze auto-freeze apps. Tap No to leave apps running (Zindan will not turn VPN back on).
Allow VPN access for Anti Spy
Zindan needs VPN permission once in the main profile to interrupt external VPN before the freeze prompt. Open Zindan and allow VPN access, then try again.
External VPN is still active. Open Zindan, ensure VPN permission is granted, or turn VPN off manually before batch-freezing.
All apps in the Auto Freeze list have been unfrozen successfully.
Freeze all apps in the Auto Freeze list
Unfreeze all apps in the Auto Freeze list
Application installation finished in work profile.

Manipulating apps that are hidden from the list could cause crashes and all sorts of unexpected behavior. However, this feature can be useful when faulty vendor-customized ROMs does not enable all necessary system apps in work profile by default. If you continue, you are on your own.

When enabled, you\'ll be able to browse / view / pick / copy files in Zindan from main profile and vice-versa, ONLY through Documents UI (named Files or Documents on your launcher) or apps with Documents UI support (they only gain temporary access to files you choose in Documents UI), while still pertaining the filesystem isolation.
Deny access from main profile to contacts inside work profile.

Enable a fake NFC payment service in the main profile, so that the "contactless payments" option under Settings - NFC becomes enabled to allow you to choose a payment app inside the work profile. This works around an Android bug that makes it impossible to select a payment app inside the work profile if none is available in the main profile.
When the screen is locked, automatically freeze apps launched from \"Unfreeze & Launch Shortcut\".

Do NOT freeze foreground apps (with visible activity) when you lock your screen. This can be useful for apps like music players, but you\'ll need to manually freeze them through \"Batch Freeze Shortcut\" afterwards.
Tap to restart monitoring. Status updates when you open Settings.
Work profile: no signal yet (open Zindan once)
No response for %1$s — tap to restart
Zindan setup complete. Now restarting Zindan. If Zindan didn\'t start automatically, you may launch it again from your launcher.
Work profile not found. Please restart the app to re-provision the profile.
It looks like you have disabled Work Mode while starting Zindan. If you have enabled it now, please start Zindan again.
Cannot clone system apps to a profile that Zindan has no control of.
Cannot uninstall system apps in a profile that Zindan has no control of.
Cannot add shortcuts to your launcher. Please contact the developer for more information.
All apps in \"Auto Freeze\" list have been frozen successfully.

Zindan needs Usage Stats permission to do this. Please enable the permission for BOTH OF THE TWO Zindan apps shown in the dialog after you press \"Ok\". Failing to do so will cause this feature to not work properly.
Cannot launch app %s because it has no GUI.
Zindan needs access to All Files for File Shuttle. Please enable the permission for BOTH OF THE TWO (Personal / Work) Zindan apps shown in the dialog after you press \"Ok\".

Zindan needs to Draw over Other Apps in order for File Shuttle to function correctly. Please enable the permission for BOTH OF THE TWO (Personal / Work) Zindan apps shown in the dialog after you press \"Ok\". This permission is used to start File Shuttle services in the background.
Cloning non-system apps to another profile is currently not possible on MIUI. Please clone your system\'s app store (e.g. Play Store) into the other profile and then install apps from there.
